style_effects: Glowing embers drift upward in slow spirals around Butterfree, each spark leaving a faint trail of molten lava-like streaks. An intense crimson-orange aura pulses rhythmically, casting jagged heat shimmer waves that distort the background. The lighting mood is a warm amber glow with flickering firelight highlights, emphasizing the fiery intensity. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
